faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about applying to Swangz Creative Academy

items.question: What is the application process?
items.answer:
1. Submit online application form
2. Upload portfolio/audition video
3. Interview with admissions team
4. Receive admission decision

items.question: What are the tuition fees?
items.answer:
Monthly Tuition: $249-$329
Registration Fee: $100
Materials Fee: $50/month
*Scholarships and payment plans available

items.question: When are the application deadlines?
items.answer:
Fall Intake: August 15
Spring Intake: January 10
Application Deadline: 2 weeks prior to intake
*Early applications receive priority

items.question: Do you offer scholarships or financial aid?
items.answer: Yes, we offer scholarships and flexible payment plans for eligible students. Please contact our admissions team for more information about available financial assistance options.

items.question: What materials do I need for my application?
items.answer: You'll need to submit an online application form, a portfolio or audition video showcasing your musical abilities, and any relevant certificates or qualifications. Specific requirements vary by course.

items.question: Can I visit the academy before applying?
items.answer: Yes! We welcome prospective students to visit our campus. Please contact us to schedule a tour. We're located at 3rd Street, Industrial Area, The Square Building, Level 2, Kampala, Uganda.

careers.title: Career Paths in Music
careers.subtitle: Discover the diverse career opportunities available to graduates of our programs.

items.title: Music Producer
items.description: Create and produce music for artists, films, and commercial projects. Work in studios or independently.

items.title: Sound Engineer
items.description: Mix and master audio recordings, work in live sound, or specialize in post-production for media.

items.title: Performing Artist
items.description: Pursue a career as a solo artist, band member, or session musician. Perform live and record albums.

items.title: Music Teacher
items.description: Educate the next generation of musicians in schools, private studios, or online platforms.

items.title: Music Composer
items.description: Write original music for films, TV shows, video games, and commercial advertising.

items.title: Music Director
items.description: Lead musical productions, conduct orchestras, or direct music programs for organizations.

items.quote: The vocal training program transformed my confidence. I went from being afraid to sing in public to performing at local venues. The instructors are incredibly supportive and professional.
items.author: Jessica Martinez

items.quote: After completing the music production course, I landed my first job at a recording studio. The hands-on experience and industry connections I gained were invaluable.
items.author: Michael Thompson

items.quote: The guitar mastery program exceeded my expectations. The personalized feedback and structured curriculum helped me progress faster than I ever imagined possible.
items.author: Alex Chen

items.quote: SCA gave me the skills and confidence to start my own music production business. The career support and alumni network continue to help me grow professionally.
items.author: Sarah Johnson

about.title: About Swangz Creative Academy
about.subtitle: A premier music education institution dedicated to nurturing the next generation of musical talent through comprehensive, accessible, and high-quality education.
about.intro: Swangz Creative Academy is a premier music education institution dedicated to nurturing the next generation of musical talent. We combine traditional music education with modern technology and industry insights.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide comprehensive, accessible, and high-quality music education that empowers students to pursue their passion and build successful careers in the music industry.
